title: Regency Centers Announces COO Retirement and Succession Plan
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., April 12, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (“Regency” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq:REG) today announced forthcoming changes to its executive management team. Jim Thompson, Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, has announced his retirement, effective December 31, 2022. Concurrently, the Company is pleased to announce the following executive management promotions, effective January 1, 2023:
